heading: Endpoints
body:
To delete the AWS (Amazon Web Services) private endpoint you specify using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas privateEndpoints aws delete <privateEndpointId> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas privateEndpoints aws delete](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-privateEndpoints-aws-delete).
